# Trevor Bland

> Full Stack Software Engineer with 8 years of experience designing, building,
> and deploying production web applications across real estate, marketing, IoT,
> and game development. Comfortable across the entire stack — front-end,
> back-end, and cloud infrastructure. Actively seeking new opportunities.

## Contact

- Email: bland.trevor96@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/trebland
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/trevor-bland-94b2941b4

## Skills

- **Languages:** TypeScript, JavaScript, Java, C#, PHP, HTML/CSS, HandlebarsJS, GraphQL
- **Frameworks & Tech:** React, NestJS, Node.js, Symfony, Flutter, Android, .NET, Godot
- **Cloud & Infra:** AWS, GCP, Pub/Sub, Docker, Azure
- **Data:** MongoDB, MySQL, PostgreSQL
- **Tools:** Git, GitHub, Bash

## Experience

- **Software Engineer — Keller Williams Realty Inc.** (Sep 2022 – Mar 2026, Remote)
  Built large portions of www.kw.com (Flutter + Java/HandlebarsJS/Brightspot CMS);
  created a NestJS wrapping service over the legacy CMS API; reduced production
  data delays from ~15 minutes to near-instant via event-driven updates;
  mentored QA engineers in test automation.
- **Full Stack Developer — I-CON Systems, LLC.** (Nov 2021 – Sep 2022, Orlando, FL)
  Built an internal fixture-assembly assistant and a water-fixture management app
  (Blazor + ReactiveUI front end, C#/.NET back end), hosted on Azure.
- **Full Stack Developer — Gravitational Marketing** (Oct 2020 – Nov 2021, Remote)
  Built Call Commando 2.0, a CRM/lead-management application.
- **Android Developer — National Metering Services, Inc.** (Aug 2019 – Jan 2020)
  Built a prototype RFID meter-scanning app in Android/Java.
- **Help Desk Specialist — Retail Technologies Corporation** (Jun 2018 – Dec 2018)
  Front-line technical support, regression testing, and SQL data work.

## Notable Projects

- **Operation Portal** — Project manager and front-end developer for a Flutter
  mobile app built for Orlando Children's Church; led a distributed team of 5.
  https://github.com/trebland/OperationPortal
- **Doc Foxx** — Designed, built, and deployed a full website (React/TypeScript/Vite
  front end, NestJS back end) on AWS (EC2, S3, CloudFront, SES, Route 53, IAM).
  https://www.docfoxx.com
- **Bash Party Game** — A multiplayer party-game prototype built in Godot,
  exploring RPCs and server/client authority. https://tibtibs.itch.io/bash-party-game

## Education

- B.S. in Computer Science — University of Central Florida (Sep 2016 – May 2020)
- Computer Science, Semester Abroad — Hong Kong Polytechnic University (Jan – May 2019)
